name: The invitation and the trophy — judge CTA plus the shareable Loop Card
description: A prominent invitation near the top invites a judge to start the guided briefing, and a Loop Card section at the bottom presents the submission's proof numbers as a shareable trophy with a download button.

planSteps.description: Verify a prominent, accent-colored invitation appears near the top of the page reading like 'Judging this? Start the 30-second briefing', clearly inviting the visitor to begin a guided briefing
Scroll to the bottom of the page to the LOOP CARD section

Verify a trophy-style Loop Card shows the wordmark OUROBOROS, the tagline 'the loop that built itself', a stat grid with labelled counts for iterations, lessons, and cloud tests plus a red 'failed runs logged' stat, references to the upstream pull requests and issue (PR #207, PR #213, issue #208), and a 'download PNG' button
